title: AnalyzePostRequest
description: Body for POST /analyze (Phase 3). The Chrome extension sends this JSON to your backend only — never to Gemini directly.

schemaVersion.description: Bump when breaking the request contract.

postText.description: Visible caption / post text the user is checking.

imageUrls.description: Zero or more image URLs the server may fetch (Phase 3 will enforce HTTPS, count, and byte limits). Omit or use [] for text-only.

metadata.description: Optional context for logging, cache keys (post_hash), or UI. Not required for analysis.

postId.description: Stable id from the host when available.
